hero.bio: Front-end developer specializing in <0>complex web platforms</0> — teleconsultation, EdTech, marketplaces. I builds <1>real-time</1> interfaces with React, Next.js and TypeScript, designed for performance, UX and maintainability.

sections.work_desc: A selection of platforms I've worked on — from double-sided marketplaces to critical real-time applications. Each project, a different business context.

about.text: <0>I</0> am interested in <1>useful</1> products, <2>ambitious</2> startups and <3>demanding</3> technical environments. Co-founder of <4>Tàgg Group</4>, I work on React / Next.js / TypeScript architectures with advanced state management and special attention to performance, UX and maintainability.
about.quote: Building interfaces that respect both <0>the end user</0> and <1>the next developer</1>.

contact.title: A project <0>in mind</0>?<1 />Let's talk.
contact.availability_text: Open to freelance missions, ambitious startup collaborations and demanding technical environments. Remote or in Dakar.

bodies.yello: Transforming raw content into interactive and measurable learning paths. Content player with block splitting, integrated quizzes with immediate validation, learner/trainer dashboard, and native HTML5 multimedia player for a lightweight and high-performance solution.
bodies.sapiow: Marketplace where knowledge seekers and experts connect for paid mentoring sessions. Advanced search with dynamic filters, seamless booking and payment tunnel, secure messaging via GetStream.io for pre/post-session exchanges and document sharing.
bodies.edaktarii: Teleconsultation platform democratizing access to specialized care for patients in Africa, by connecting them to a network of European-based doctors. Robust low-latency videoconferencing, secure patient/doctor messaging, Core Web Vitals optimization and WCAG accessibility.
bodies.soveur: B2C marketplace to find and book local services (gardening, electricity, lessons). Dual booking system: remote via auto-generated Google Meet, or in-person with logistics management. Geolocation search, availability calendar, payment tunnel.
bodies.betech: Interface allowing researchers to explore, filter and consult a voluminous scientific database. Search engine with autocompletion, combinable complex filters, interactive visualizations. Aggressive caching and virtual pagination for responsiveness on large volumes.
bodies.casacloud: Centralized administrative dashboard for customer and operational data of a call center. Customizable dashboards, visualizations with Chart.js/Recharts, real-time centralization of active calls, queues, agent performance and KPIs.
bodies.medteck: P2P marketplace combining three transactional modes: item exchange (barter), classic purchase, and purchase with real-time price negotiation. Redux store orchestrating catalog, cart, negotiation sessions, messages and notifications. Pure CSS interface without component library.
